requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and EMC — Georgian Charge-Point Operator Requirements and IEC 61000 Compliance
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作与EMC——格鲁吉亚充电点运营商要求及IEC 61000合规
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作與EMC——喬治亞充電點運營商要求及IEC 61000合規

summary.en: Georgia's public EV charging network is developing rapidly, led by operators such as E-Space and Tesla destination chargers. Networked public chargers are expected to use OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) for back-office communication, consistent with Georgia's EU-aligned IEC framework. OCPP compliance enables remote monitoring, fault notification, access control, and energy consumption reporting required by Georgian charge-point operators. For EMC, GEOSTM adopts the IEC 61000 series, which sets conducted and radiated emission limits and immunity requirements for electrical equipment including EV chargers. IEC 61000-3-2 and IEC 61000-3-3 limits apply to harmonic current emissions and voltage fluctuations from AC-connected chargers. EMC test evidence from an ILAC-recognised laboratory against IEC 61000 series is expected for market acceptance in Georgia.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚公共电动汽车充电网络发展迅速，由E-Space和特斯拉目的地充电等运营商主导。联网公共充电桩须采用OCPP（开放充电点协议）进行后台通信，与格鲁吉亚与欧盟对接的IEC框架一致。OCPP合规使格鲁吉亚充电点运营商所需的远程监控、故障通知、访问控制和用电报告成为可能。在EMC方面，GEOSTM采用IEC 61000系列，该系列为包括电动汽车充电桩在内的电气设备设定了传导和辐射发射限值及抗扰度要求。IEC 61000-3-2和IEC 61000-3-3限值适用于交流接入充电桩的谐波电流发射和电压波动。格鲁吉亚市场准入期望获得ILAC认可实验室针对IEC 61000系列出具的EMC测试证据。
summary.zht: 喬治亞公共電動汽車充電網絡發展迅速，由E-Space和特斯拉目的地充電等運營商主導。聯網公共充電樁須採用OCPP（開放充電點協議）進行後台通訊，與喬治亞與歐盟對接的IEC框架一致。OCPP合規使喬治亞充電點運營商所需的遠程監控、故障通知、訪問控制和用電報告成為可能。在EMC方面，GEOSTM採用IEC 61000系列，該系列為包括電動汽車充電樁在內的電氣設備設定了傳導和輻射發射限值及抗擾度要求。IEC 61000-3-2和IEC 61000-3-3限值適用於交流接入充電樁的諧波電流發射和電壓波動。喬治亞市場準入期望獲得ILAC認可實驗室針對IEC 61000系列出具的EMC測試證據。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000-3-3 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker in public low-voltage supply systems
IEC 61000-4 series — Testing and measurement techniques — immunity requirements
GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology (geostm.gov.ge)
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement proprietary or OCPP-based back-office protocols depending on the operator. For EMC, Chinese chargers are typically tested to GB/T 18487 and related GB/T EMC standards, which correspond structurally to IEC 61000 but are not accepted in place of IEC 61000 series accredited test reports for Georgian market access.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用私有或基于OCPP的后台协议。在EMC方面，中国充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487及相关GB/T EMC标准进行测试，这些标准在结构上与IEC 61000对应，但不能替代格鲁吉亚市场准入所要求的IEC 61000系列认可测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用私有或基於OCPP的後台協議。在EMC方面，中國充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487及相關GB/T EMC標準進行測試，這些標準在結構上與IEC 61000對應，但不能替代喬治亞市場準入所要求的IEC 61000系列認可測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China GB/T EMC standards (corresponding structurally to IEC 61000 but not equivalent for Georgian market acceptance)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports an OCPP version accepted by the intended Georgian charge-point operator (typically OCPP 1.6J or OCPP 2.0.1); (2) back-office API integration and site testing are completed before operator activation; (3) for DC stations, GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 compatibility; (4) EMC test evidence against IEC 61000-3-2, IEC 61000-3-3, and relevant IEC 61000-4 immunity standards is obtained from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; (5) conducted and radiated emission limits under IEC 61000 are met. GB/T EMC test reports alone are not equivalent to IEC 61000 accredited evidence for Georgian conformity purposes.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持目标格鲁吉亚充电点运营商所接受的OCPP版本（通常为OCPP 1.6J或OCPP 2.0.1）；(2) 在运营商激活前完成后台API集成和现场测试；(3) 直流充电站将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈以兼容CCS2；(4) 从ILAC认可实验室获得针对IEC 61000-3-2、IEC 61000-3-3及相关IEC 61000-4抗扰度标准的EMC测试证据；(5) 满足IEC 61000传导和辐射发射限值。单独的GB/T EMC测试报告不等同于格鲁吉亚合格评定所要求的IEC 61000认可证据。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持目標喬治亞充電點運營商所接受的OCPP版本（通常為OCPP 1.6J或OCPP 2.0.1）；(2) 在運營商激活前完成後台API集成和現場測試；(3) 直流充電站將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧以兼容CCS2；(4) 從ILAC認可實驗室獲得針對IEC 61000-3-2、IEC 61000-3-3及相關IEC 61000-4抗擾度標準的EMC測試證據；(5) 滿足IEC 61000傳導和輻射發射限值。單獨的GB/T EMC測試報告不等同於喬治亞合格評定所要求的IEC 61000認可證據。

mandatory_status.target: OCPP: expected by major Georgian charge-point operators for networked public chargers; EMC: mandatory under GEOSTM-adopted IEC 61000 series for electrical equipment including EV chargers
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible; GB/T EMC reports are not substitutes for IEC 61000 accredited evidence in Georgia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office integration is expected for networked public chargers in Georgia, and IEC 61000 EMC evidence from an accredited laboratory is required under GEOSTM-adopted standards. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP implementation cannot be activated on Georgian public charging networks without firmware and communication-stack redesign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚联网公共充电桩须进行OCPP后台集成，且GEOSTM采用标准要求提供认可实验室出具的IEC 61000 EMC证据。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且未实现OCPP的充电桩在不进行固件和通信栈重新设计的情况下，无法在格鲁吉亚公共充电网络上激活。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喬治亞聯網公共充電樁須進行OCPP後台集成，且GEOSTM採用標準要求提供認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000 EMC證據。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且未實現OCPP的充電樁在不進行固件和通訊棧重新設計的情況下，無法在喬治亞公共充電網絡上激活。
